zh.lifeSummary: 當Patience Mary Collins於1679年2月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德時，她的父親Daniel Collins Sr31歲，母親Sarah Tibbals24歲。她和James Killam至少有1個兒子和10個女兒。她去世於1745年6月5日在她的家鄉享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patience Mary Collins于1679年2月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德时，她的父亲Daniel Collins Sr31岁，母亲Sarah Tibbals24岁。她和James Killam至少有1个儿子和10个女儿。她去世于1745年6月5日在她的家乡享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Collins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Colin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish and Manx: shortened Anglicized from Ó Coileáin, compare Cullen , or in Man or west Ulster shortened from Mac Coileáin, compare McQuillan and McCallion . The genitival -s is a local addition to Collin and variants after the surname was Anglicized.
Americanized form of French   Colin   or   Collin   and also   Collette  .

variants.name: Colin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Alfredo, Francisco, Jesus, Ricardo, Alberto, Angel, Arturo, Eduardo, Esteban, Faustino.  French Alexandre, Andre, Armand, Georges, Henri, Jean Claude, Jean-Michel, Laurette, Lucien, Marcel, Patrice, Pierre.
French, Walloon, and Breton: from a French shortened pet form of the personal name   Nicolas   (see   Nicholas  ). This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.
English: from the personal name Colin, a diminutive of Col, itself a pet form of Nicholas .

variants.name: Kolenc
meanings: nickname from the dialect plant name kolenc ‘yellow bedstraw (Galium verum)’ or ‘common nipplewort (Lapsana communis)’. Compare Collins 3.

variants.name: Collings
meanings: English: variant of Collins or Colling , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Patience
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting one of the Seven Christian Virtues. The vocabulary word is derived from Latin pati ‘to suffer’, and was associated by the early Christians with those who endured persecution and misfortune without complaint or loss of faith. It was a favourite with the Puritans, but fell out of regular use in the 20th century.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

en.lifeSummary: When Patience Mary Collins was born on 9 February 1679, in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Daniel Collins Sr, was 31 and her mother, Sarah Tibbals, was 24. She had at least 1 son and 10 daughters with James Killam. She died on 5 June 1745, in her hometown, at the age of 66.

Februar 1679 in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Daniel Collins Sr 31 und ihre Mutter Sarah Tibbals 24. ko.lifeSummary: Patience Mary Collins(이)가 1679년 2월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Daniel Collins Sr(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Tibbals(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 James Killam(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1745년 6월 5일 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patience Mary Collins родилась 9 февраля 1679 г. в местности энфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Daniel Collins Sr было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Sarah Tibbals, 24. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 10 дочерей от James Killam. Она умерла 5 июня 1745 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Patience Mary Collins nació el 9 de febrero de 1679, en Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Daniel Collins Sr, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Sarah Tibbals, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 10 hijas con James Killam. Murió el 5 de junio de 1745, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
